train_optimizer.message: CONVERGENCE: RELATIVE REDUCTION OF F <= FACTR*EPSMCH

interpretation: Out-of-sample temporal ETAS validation: MLE fit on train GK mainshocks only; hold-out detector run on 2001–2026 catalog. Complements (does not replace) in-sample p_ETAS=1.0 on full 1973–2026 window.
model_mismatch_note: ETAS is a triggering model fit on GK-declustered mainshocks; declustering removes events the model would treat as offspring — acknowledged limitation.
